title: Plastic Waste Leakage Into Marine Environments From Coastal Cities
summary: Build a verified workflow for estimating plastic waste leakage into marine environments from coastal cities, linking waste-generation data, river-plume data, and marine-debris observations.
why_it_matters: Build a verified workflow for estimating plastic waste leakage into marine environments from coastal cities, linking waste-generation data, river-plume data, and marine-debris observations.

success_metrics.target: Every claim links dated evidence with methodology.

review_policy.merge_gate: Schema validation, domain review, safety review, replication.
